answer:
\boxed{I}  

PCA performs eigendecomposition on the covariance matrix (size \(d \times d\)), while spectral clustering typically uses the Laplacian matrix (size \(n \times n\)), so their matrix sizes are generally not the same — making Statement 1 false. Logistic regression is not a special case of linear regression because it uses a different loss function and output type, so Statement 2 is also false. Thus, the correct pairing is False, False.
